ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data point */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the data is sourced from */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are denominated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the timestamp */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the trading instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the trading instrument during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the trading instrument during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the trading instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades executed */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Count of trades executed */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the trader belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the trader */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the trader was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who initiated the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the session is conducted */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., manual, algorithmic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session during which the trade was executed */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data point associated with the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading instrument */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade executed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "order_side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "execution_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for execution (e.g., immediate, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES market_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Class of the asset (e.g., equity, forex) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the instrument belongs to (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the instrument information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session being assessed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk associated with the session (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_time" TEXT /* Time when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the risk assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the assessment */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader whose performance is being tracked */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session associated with the metrics */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss made during the session */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment calculated for the session */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for the session */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the session */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id")
)
